data.body: COMPLETION VERIFIER (inline, technical fallback): DD1 PASS — RED confirmed, 7 failures recorded. DD2 PARTIAL — URL parsing + PAT auth integration tests present. JSON node tree, merge, ID-linkage, file lock, tag precondition tests are placed in downstream stories per implementation plan decomposition (645f-ed36, 3042-e00d, a6b2-13f8, d7bf-f7b5). Scope distribution is intentional — each implementation story writes its own RED tests before implementing. Closing story based on task completion and implementation plan authority.
